title: Cooperation with other states
doc_html:
§44.  Cooperation with other states

The governor may negotiate and act in concert with the proper authorities of other states with a view to effecting a synchronization and uniformity of blackouts and other precautionary measures in this state and all parts of other states necessary to carry out the intent and purpose of this Chapter.
doc_text:
§44.  Cooperation with other states
The governor may negotiate and act in concert with the proper authorities of other states with a view to effecting a synchronization and uniformity of blackouts and other precautionary measures in this state and all parts of other states necessary to carry out the intent and purpose of this Chapter.
